title: fix: add missing API keys to enter prod secrets
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Music to our ears
gist.blurb: We found the missing sheet music. Suno music generation is back online and ready to turn your prompts into bangers.
gist.summary: Resolved an infrastructure configuration issue that was preventing Suno music generation from completing successfully.
gist.impact: Music generation via the Suno model is fully operational and stable again.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee finding a glowing 'key' (API key) that unlocks a retro boombox, causing musical notes to sprout from it like plants.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot holding a glowing golden key, hovering next to a chunky retro boombox that is sprouting colorful musical notes like flowers. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
